questions.question: Which is a correct statement about Spine/Leaf architecture?
choices: The Leaf switches connect to other Leaf switches.
There is only one Spine switch per network.
Spine switches provide access to hosts.
The Leaf switches never connect to other Leaf switches, only Spine switches.

incorrect.explanation: "The Leaf switches connect to other Leaf switches." is incorrect because the scenario requires: The correct answer is "The Leaf switches never connect to other Leaf switches, only Spine switches.".
